    Description
    AnnotationRequest
    Request object used to create a new annotation.
    AnnotationResponse
    Response object representing an annotation.
    CollectionRequest
    Request object used to create a new collection.
    CollectionResponse
    Response object representing a collection.
    ItemRequest
    Request object used to create or store a NASA media item.
    ItemResponse
    Response object representing a stored NASA media item.
    UserCreateRequest
    Request object used to create a new user account.
    UserResponse
    Response object representing a user.
